text: morning everyone — quick standup. I'm pushing the auth refactor today, finally. Going to merge once tests are green.
<@U02SARAH> great. Did you ever figure out the session-token issue from yesterday?
yeah, turns out we were double-encoding the JWT before sending. one-line fix once I traced it. only took six hours of staring at headers :sob:
lol classic. anyway — I'm finishing the new pricing page. Marketing wants it live before Friday's announcement.
wait, friday? I thought the announcement was next week. Did the date move and nobody told me?
yes lol. Anthony moved it up after the competitor leak yesterday. Did you see the TechCrunch piece?
no I have not been on the internet. so we are now shipping pricing, auth, AND the new dashboard in 3 days?
I think dashboard gets cut. We can ship pricing + auth and announce the dashboard as 'coming next week.'
agree. dashboard isn't ready for the demo flow anyway. Anthony will live.
ok so the plan is: Sarah ships auth today, Priya ships pricing tomorrow, I do the QA sweep Thursday, we announce Friday morning. Yes?
yes. also can we please not announce on a Friday afternoon next time. I am tired of weekend rollbacks.
FRIDAY MORNING. like, 9am Pacific. it's in the announcement doc.
ok ok. I'll trust the doc this time :pray:
I'll send a calendar invite for a Thursday EOD sync. Bring laptops, bring snacks, bring resolve.
